allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''OpenAI key present:'''', bool\(d.get\(''''key''''\)\)\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {$_IPAddress -notlike ''127.*''} | Select-Object IPAddress; \(Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object {$_Status -eq ''Up''} | Select-Object -First 1\).MacAddress")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://apiconnect.angelone.in/rest/auth/angelbroking/user/v1/loginByPassword" -H "Accept: application/json" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-UserType: USER" -H "X-SourceID: WEB" -H "X-PrivateKey: NE83ZEA3" -H "X-ClientLocalIP: 192.168.1.50" -H "X-ClientPublicIP: 61.2.75.161" -H "X-MACaddress: 80-B6-55-45-3C-06" -d "{""clientcode"":""DIYD12021"",""password"":""5599"",""totp"":""123456""}" -v)
